name: Suggest Next Click / Action from Screenshot
description: Given a screenshot of an application, suggest the most likely next user interaction or action based on what is visible. Tests actionability of vision analysis output.

input.prompt: Analyze this screenshot. Based on what you can see, what is the most likely next action a user should take? Is there a highlighted button, navigation element, or call-to-action that suggests the natural next step?

scripted_response.answer: The screenshot shows a prominent blue header or banner at the top of the screen, which typically indicates a navigation bar, primary action area, or call-to-action. The most likely next action is to interact with the blue banner/header area, as it is the most visually prominent element and appears to be the primary interactive region of the interface.
scripted_response.suggested_action: click or tap the blue header/action area at the top
